query: Tailored business agreements in 90 seconds alternative

results.title: LuminPDF
results.content:
An agreement or contract generator is a powerful tool to create and customize professional documents in minutes, not hours.   
    
  Instead of manually drafting from scratch or copying an old document, an it uses AI to help you create and customize contracts and agreements tailored to your needs.  
    
  This means less time wrestling with agreement drafting, and more time growing your business.
 Your generation options are virtually limitless. Commonly created agreements include NDAs, sales contracts, lease agreements, and employee onboarding documents.  
    
  Whether you’re in professional services, education, real estate, or HR, AgreementGen lets you quickly generate and refine the agreements you need to keep things moving forward. [...] ## Introducing AgreementGen beta

AgreementGen is in beta, so some outputs may need refining, and features may not work as expected. Share your feedback to help us build the perfect solution for businesses like yours.

Try AgreementGen beta

### Complete contract and agreement creation suite

Still stuck copying old agreements and contracts? Welcome to the future. AgreementGen's AI creates professional, customized contracts in minutes. This is what modern document creation should be - smart, simple, and actually enjoyable to use.

### Agreements made easy

 

  #### Professional agreement generation

  Tell our AI what you need and create tailored documents in minutes.
 

  #### Send for signing [...] #### Send for signing

  AgreementGen is integrated with LuminSign, enabling you to collect legally binding eSignatures in seconds.
 

  #### Smart business management (coming soon)

  Connect your business systems and let your data do the work. Auto-populate documents using your existing business information.

### No more PDF limitations

Upload and update existing PDF and Word contracts and agreements with our AI-powered editor. Transform rigid documents into flexible and editable content in seconds.

Edit your agreement

### Enterprise-grade security, because agreements matter

Lumin’s products are enforced with a rigorous and up-to-date security system. We work hard to deliver specialized security solutions alongside industry-standard compliance.

Learn more

results.title: 8 Best Tailor Brands Alternatives in 2025 (Updated)
results.content:
### Alternative #2: MyCompanyWorks

MyCompanyWorks offers a suite of business formation services. They assist in forming various business entities, including LLCs, C-corps and S-corps, while providing ongoing compliance support.

MyCompanyWorks’ greatest advantage over Tailor Brands is that they offer straightforward pricing and online filing. Other benefits include their document preparation service, which helps users complete paperwork accurately and efficiently. They also provide comprehensive resources.

That said, some users report delayed customer support responses, potentially causing frustration. Additional services beyond basic packages may come with extra costs, making it less budget-friendly. [...] ZenBusiness appeals to socially conscious entrepreneurs seeking business formation services. It's well-suited for individuals who value environmental responsibility and a user-friendly platform. However, potential users should carefully review pricing details and consider whether they can tolerate potential support delays.

### Features

### Pricing

ZenBusiness offers multiple pricing options based on what you want to do with the software.

If you want to proceed with:

You can visit ZenBusiness’ pricing page and get to know more as per your requirements.

### Alternative #4: Rocket Lawyer

Rocket Lawyer is an online legal service that offers a range of legal document templates, legal advice, and business formation assistance. [...] MyCompanyWorks suits entrepreneurs seeking comprehensive business formation assistance. It's a decent service if you value a user-friendly platform, but can tolerate potential customer support delays and additional expenses.

#### Features

#### Pricing

MyCompanyWorks offers a custom pricing model where you can select the business type and state in which you want your business incorporated. The platform will then give you the pricing accordingly.

### Alternative #3: ZenBusiness

ZenBusiness is a business formation service catering to startups and small businesses, offering assistance in the registration and management of various business entities.

## Artificial Intelligence Contract Analysis

Leveraging the power of several of the most advanced AI large language model (LLMs) APIs, custom trained by lawyers, our contract review AI platform offers real-time informational insights on every kind of contract in every common-law jurisdiction. results.title: Online Contract Maker – Free Digital Contract Generator | Jotform
results.content:
## 200+ Free Online Contract Templates

No need to create your online contracts from scratch. Get a head start with our free contract templates you can customize for your business in just a few clicks.

Benefits

## Benefits of Using an Online Contract Maker

## Create contracts in minutes:

Use Jotform’s online contract maker with ready-to-use templates or upload your own document to build contracts without coding. Drag-and-drop tools let you add party details, terms, and signature fields quickly so agreements are ready to send sooner.

## Work smarter with automation

Automate contract workflows by sending contracts automatically, setting reminders for signers, and tracking response statuses in real time. This reduces manual follow-ups and keeps each contract moving toward completion. [...] ## Turn Contracts into Fillable PDFs

Convert existing contract PDFs into interactive, fillable forms. Collect responses, signatures, and data without the hassle of emailing static files.

## Gain Insights from Your Contracts

Analyze contract data with Jotform Report Builder. Generate charts and reports on contract volume, approval times, or signature completion rates to improve business decisions.

## Work Smarter with AI-Powered Contract Assistance

Take your contract process to the next level with Jotform AI Agents. From drafting agreements faster to answering contract-related questions, AI helps you save time and focus on what matters most. Combine Jotform’s Online Contract Maker with AI Agents to create, review, and manage contracts more efficiently.

## Frequently Asked Questions [...] ## Custom branding

Apply company branding to contract documents for a consistent, professional look. Branded contracts reinforce trust and help agreements reflect your organization’s identity.

Testimonials

## What our users say about Jotform

I started using Jotform back in 2013 when the nonprofit I worked for was just two of us and our use of Jotform's functionality and service supported our growth to being a 50+ employee global news nonprofit working with hundreds of contractors and donors from around the globe in just a few years. I've moved to a new nonprofit, but I took Jotform with me and now we're modernizing operations for a small organization that has been around for years doing things on paper for two decades.

Tiffany Roufs, Operations Manager, North Star PG

results.title: The 12 Best Small Business Contract Templates for 2026 -
results.content:
Legal Chain establishes itself as a premier, well-rounded solution for businesses seeking more than just static small business contract templates. It operates as a comprehensive legal-tech platform that integrates AI-powered drafting, intelligent review, and an optional blockchain-capable trust layer. This unique combination addresses the entire contract lifecycle, making it an exceptional choice for founders, in-house teams, and freelancers who need both speed and document integrity.

Instead of just providing downloadable files, Legal Chain’s AI-guided drafting uses structured clause intelligence to help you build customized, clear agreements. The system accelerates the creation of everything from service agreements to NDAs, reducing manual effort while improving clarity. [...] Website: 

## 10. Dropbox Sign (formerly HelloSign)

Dropbox Sign, formerly known as HelloSign, positions itself as a secure, e-signature-first platform that incorporates reusable small business contract templates. It is an excellent choice for businesses that prioritize a seamless and secure signing workflow over an extensive, built-in legal library. The platform is designed for efficiency, allowing you to upload an existing agreement, save it as a template, and send it for legally binding signatures in minutes. [...] Website: 

## 4. LawDepot

LawDepot offers one of the most extensive and user-friendly catalogs of small business contract templates, distinguished by its robust state-specific customization. The platform guides you through a detailed questionnaire, automatically tailoring clauses to comply with your state’s laws, making it an excellent choice for businesses operating across different jurisdictions. It simplifies the creation of everything from consulting agreements to sales contracts.
